qurbaniDescription: Qurbani, an obligation on able Muslim believers to gain the satisfaction of Allah, is also a right of the needy. However, over time, this sacred festival has become about buying new refrigerators and indulging in meat (Astaghfirullah). In this era of extreme inflation, millions of families have lost the ability to purchase sacrificial animals. On this blessed day, we hope no father bleeds in his heart due to the innocent questions of a child in any middle-class or underprivileged household. This is why we have taken this small initiative. You can join us in this effort too. Join us in building a hunger-free Bangladesh. Your single donation will bring smiles to thousands of needy families.
arraggyaDescription: Health and well-being are blessings from the Creator for all of humanity. We become acutely aware of this blessing when we or our loved ones fall ill. Perhaps when we get sick, you or I seek medical attention, and after taking medicine, we regain health by the grace of Almighty Allah. But have you ever thought? How do those who struggle to afford even a single meal suffer year after year from illnesses? The result is often an inhumane death. At Deepayan, we believe that every person has the right to live healthily. We have a trained team of health workers and a group of compassionate doctors who tirelessly work to bring smiles to the faces of these helpless people. Our future plan includes the  Deepayan Arraggya Clinic , which will provide free medical care to a large population. In this effort to build a disease-free Bangladesh, your donation will bring smiles to the faces of thousands of underprivileged patients. Welcome to this commitment to building a Golden Bangladesh.
